description: It's not just you, but your footwear too that needs to smell good. Bring out your footwear without much ado, spray the timberland Air Raider boot and shoe Refresher onto them and allow them to smell fresh and odour free. Quantity: 150 mlMildly scented refresher spray that rids footwear off odour causing micro-organisms AOX-free spray with no surfactants, which makes it environment-friendlyPrevents mould and mildew stainsContains Betrix to prevent accidental ingestionDirectionsSpray from a distance of 4"Allow to dry before wearing the footwear
